scripts.preinstall: node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); if (maj<20 || (maj===20 && min<19)) { console.error('Node 20.19+ is required. Run: nvm use 20'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.predev: node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); if (maj<20 || (maj===20 && min<19)) { console.error('Node 20.19+ is required. Run: nvm use 20'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); if (maj<20 || (maj===20 && min<19)) { console.error('Node 20.19+ is required. Run: nvm use 20'); process.exit(1); }"
